segments.text: Bold Devil Wing on the special, but...
segments.original_text: 必殺技は果敢にデビルウィングですが
これもかわされてしかしなんとか

segments.text: Djiro nails the perfect getup situation!
segments.original_text: 起き上がり展開完成しきったDjiro

segments.text: Into the side B – no way!
segments.original_text: コマから横必殺まさか

full_text: Bold Devil Wing on the special, but... Gets dodged again, but somehow... Djiro nails the perfect getup situation! Nair! Into the side B – no way! KO!
